overall.description: First-person exploration of a foggy medieval castle or cathedral at night. The player ascends an external stone staircase and walks through atmospheric corridors with gothic architecture, transitioning from open terraces to covered walkways illuminated by warm torchlight against a starry night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: external stone staircase on castle wall

events.description: reaches the top of the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep external stone stairs of a castle, moving toward a lit tower in the distance

entered.detail: steep stone block stairs ascending along the castle wall
tall crenellated stone wall forming the right boundary
stone wall rising on the left side of the stairs
tall tower with bright light at the top visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Ascending a steep external stone staircase of a medieval castle at night. The path is flanked by high stone walls, with a lighthouse tower visible in the foggy distance against a starry sky.

events.description: exits staircase onto open terrace walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the open terrace with stone balustrade, approaching a gothic archway

entered.detail: flat stone-paved walkway at the top of the stairs
stone railing along the edge of the terrace
large gothic stone archway forming the entrance to the interior
round stone tower visible in the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open castle terrace with a stone balustrade on the left and a massive archway ahead on the right. The lighthouse tower shifts to the left as the camera moves forward, revealing a distant round tower in the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gothic corridor with wooden ceiling

events.description: enters covered corridor through stone archway
lighting shifts to warm artificial torchlight as moving deeper into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit covered corridor, passing gothic arches with views to the outside

entered.detail: long corridor with stone floor and wooden ceiling beams
heavy wooden beams forming the roof of the corridor
tall arched openings along the left wall showing exterior night view
lit torch sconces mounted on the right wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered gothic corridor illuminated by warm wall sconces. The corridor features wooden ceiling beams and arched windows on the left revealing the night sky and a distant illuminated round tower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a steep external ascent into the sheltered, torchlit depths of a medieval fortress. It begins by climbing a narrow stone staircase flanked by high walls, with a distant lighthouse tower peering through the fog under a starry sky. As the camera reaches the top, the path opens onto a wide terrace where the lighthouse shifts to the periphery, revealing a second round tower emerging from the mist ahead. The scene then shifts from the open night air into a covered gothic corridor, where the cool moonlight is replaced by the warm glow of wall sconces. Finally, the camera glides beneath heavy wooden ceiling beams, passing arched windows that maintain a glimpse of the illuminated tower in the distance.
